title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 431.120 - Joint debt shall survive, against whom
text:
431.120.  Joint debt shall survive, against whom. — In case of the death of one or more of the joint obligors or promisors, the joint debt or contract shall and may survive against the heirs, executors and administrators of the deceased obligor or promisor, as well as against the survivors.
(RSMo 1939 § 3341) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2954; 1919 § 2156; 1909 § 2770
